descriptionCompact: Compact cashflow view is enabled. Start with a smaller chart and expand later if needed.
descriptionPersonal: Start with a clean personal structure and adapt it only where you need more detail.
descriptionOrganizational: Start with a practical business-ready chart of accounts and then refine it for your organization.
standardDescription: Load a generic chart of accounts designed as a strong starting point.
uploadDescription: Upload a chart using the provided template headers.
manualDescription: Paste delimited rows when you want to bootstrap quickly from text.
permissionError: You do not have permission to manage ledger accounts.
